Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(***********************************************************************************

 Monads can be composed if we have a distributive law between them

 This results holds for monads in arbitrary bicategories. For monads of categories,
 this was already proved in Monads.Derivative.v (`monad_comp`)

 ***********************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.MonadsLax.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Monads.DistributiveLaws.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section ComposeMonad.
  Context {B : bicat}
          {x : B}
          (dm₁ dm₂ : disp_mnd B x)
          (α : distr_law dm₁ dm₂).

  Let m₁ : mnd B := x ,, dm₁.
  Let m₂ : mnd B := x ,, dm₂.

  Let f : x --> x := endo_of_mnd m₁.
  Let g : x --> x := endo_of_mnd m₂.

  Let η₁ : id₁ _ ==> f := unit_of_mnd m₁.
  Let η₂ : id₁ _ ==> g := unit_of_mnd m₂.

  Let μ₁ : f · f ==> f := mult_of_mnd m₁.
  Let μ₂ : g · g ==> g := mult_of_mnd m₂.

  Let ηc : id₁ x ==> f · g
    := linvunitor _ • (η₁ ▹ _) • (_ ◃ η₂).

  Let μc
    : f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
    := rassociator _ _ _
       • (f ◃ lassociator _ _ _)
       • (f ◃ (α ▹ g))
       • (f ◃ rassociator _ _ _)
       • lassociator _ _ _
       • (μ₁ ▹ _)
       • (_ ◃ μ₂).

  
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(linvunitor (f · g) • (ηc ▹ f · g)) • μc = id₂ (f · g)

  
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(linvunitor (f · g) • (ηc ▹ f · g)) • μc = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(linvunitor (f · g)
 • (((linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂))
    ▹ f · g))
• ((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
        • (f
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • (f
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
     • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
    • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂)) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(linvunitor (f · g)
 • (((linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂))
    ▹ f · g))
• ((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
        • (f
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • (f
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
     • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
    • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂)) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
linvunitor (f · g)
• (((linvunitor (id₁ x) • ((η₁ ▹ id₁ x) • (f ◃ η₂)))
    ▹ f · g)
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
linvunitor (f · g)
• (((linvunitor (id₁ x) • ((η₁ ▹ id₁ x) • (f ◃ η₂)))
    ▹ f · g)
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = ?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
linvunitor (f · g)
• (((linvunitor (id₁ x) • ((η₁ ▹ id₁ x) • (f ◃ η₂)))
    ▹ f · g)
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((linvunitor (id₁ x) • ((η₁ ▹ id₁ x) • (f ◃ η₂)))
 ▹ f · g)
• (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
   • ((f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
      • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
         • ((f
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
            • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
               • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • (f ◃ μ₂))))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(linvunitor (id₁ x) • ((η₁ ▹ id₁ x) • (f ◃ η₂)))
▹ f · g = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂))
▹ f · g = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x) = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
linvunitor (id₁ x) • id₂ (id₁ x) ⋆⋆ η₁ = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rinvunitor (id₁ x) • id₂ (id₁ x) ⋆⋆ η₁ = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
η₁ • rinvunitor f = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
linvunitor (f · g)
• ((((η₁ • rinvunitor f) • (f ◃ η₂)) ▹ f · g)
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((linvunitor f ▹ g) • rassociator (id₁ x) f g)
• ((((η₁ • rinvunitor f) • (f ◃ η₂)) ▹ f · g)
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(linvunitor f ▹ g)
• (rassociator (id₁ x) f g
   • (((η₁ • (rinvunitor f • (f ◃ η₂))) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                  • (lassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • ((μ₁
                         ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                        • (f ◃ μ₂))))))))) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(linvunitor f ▹ g)
• (rassociator (id₁ x) f g
   • (((η₁ • (rinvunitor f • (f ◃ η₂))) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                  • (lassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • ((μ₁
                         ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                        • (f ◃ μ₂))))))))) = ?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(linvunitor f ▹ g)
• (rassociator (id₁ x) f g
   • (((η₁ • (rinvunitor f • (f ◃ η₂))) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                  • (lassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • ((μ₁
                         ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                        • (f ◃ μ₂))))))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (id₁ x) f g
• (((η₁ • (rinvunitor f • (f ◃ η₂))) ▹ f · g)
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((rassociator (id₁ x) f g
       • (((η₁ • rinvunitor f) • (f ◃ η₂)) ▹ f · g))
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((η₁ • rinvunitor f) • (f ◃ η₂)) ▹ f) ▹ g)
       • rassociator (f · g) f g)
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((η₁ ▹ f) ▹ g) • ((rinvunitor f ▹ f) ▹ g))
        • (((f ◃ η₂) ▹ f) ▹ g))
       • rassociator (f · g) f g)
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((η₁ ▹ f) ▹ g)
• (((rinvunitor f ▹ f) ▹ g)
   • ((((f ◃ η₂) ▹ f) ▹ g)
      • (rassociator (f · g) f g
         • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
               • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                     • (lassociator f
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                        • ((μ₁
                            ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · g) • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(linvunitor f ▹ g)
• (((η₁ ▹ f) ▹ g)
   • (((rinvunitor f ▹ f) ▹ g)
      • ((((f ◃ η₂) ▹ f) ▹ g)
         • (rassociator (f · g) f g
            • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                        • (lassociator f
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · g)
                           • ((μ₁
                               ▹ endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                              • (f ◃ μ₂))))))))))) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((linvunitor f ▹ g) • ((η₁ ▹ f) ▹ g))
         • ((rinvunitor f ▹ f) ▹ g))
        • (((f ◃ η₂) ▹ f) ▹ g))
       • rassociator (f · g) f g)
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((linvunitor f • (η₁ ▹ f)) ▹ g)
         • ((rinvunitor f ▹ f) ▹ g))
        • (((f ◃ η₂) ▹ f) ▹ g))
       • rassociator (f · g) f g)
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((linvunitor f • (η₁ ▹ f)) ▹ g)
• (((rinvunitor f ▹ f) ▹ g)
   • ((((f ◃ η₂) ▹ f) ▹ g)
      • (rassociator (f · g) f g
         • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

                        • ((μ₁
                            ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · g) • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))))) =
id₂ (f · g)

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

• (((rinvunitor f ▹ f) ▹ g)
   • ((((f ◃ η₂) ▹ f) ▹ g)
      • (rassociator (f · g) f g

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((linvunitor f • (η₁ ▹ f)) ▹ g)
• (((rinvunitor f ▹ f) ▹ g)
   • ((((f ◃ η₂) ▹ f) ▹ g)
      • (rassociator (f · g) f g
         • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
               • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                     • (lassociator f
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                        • ((μ₁
                            ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · g) • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) f g
• (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      g • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t20

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((f ◃ α) ▹ g)
    • rassociator f
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        g)
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t20

        apply idpath.

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((linvunitor f • (η₁ ▹ f)) ▹ g)
• (((rinvunitor f ▹ f) ▹ g)
   • ((((f ◃ η₂) ▹ f) ▹ g)
      • (((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) • (f ◃ α)) ▹ g)
         • (rassociator f
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)

                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = id₂ (f · g)

                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = ?b

 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((linvunitor f
  • ((η₁ ▹ f)
     • ((f ◃ linvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
        • ((f ◃ (η₂ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
           • ((f ◃ α)
              • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))))))) ▹ g)
• (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
   • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) • (f ◃ μ₂))) =
id₂ (f · g)

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((linvunitor f
  • ((η₁ ▹ f)
     • ((f ◃ linvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
        • ((f ◃ (η₂ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
           • ((f ◃ α)
              • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))))))) ▹ g)
• (((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g)
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
      • (f ◃ μ₂))) = id₂ (f · g)

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂

       • (f ◃ linvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))))
      • (f ◃ (η₂ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))) • (f ◃ α))
    • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))) ▹ g)
  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
 • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g

 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
• (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) = ?t20

  • ((η₁ ▹ f)
     • (((f
          ◃ (rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)

id₂ (f · g)

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (id₁ x)
 • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(id₂ g ⋆⋆ rinvunitor f
 • (rassociator f (id₁ x) g
    • (f ◃ (unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ▹ g)))) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((id₂ g ⋆⋆ rinvunitor f • rassociator f (id₁ x) g)
 • (f ◃ (unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ▹ g))) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(linvunitor g ⋆⋆ id₂ f
 • (f ◃ (unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ▹ g))) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f ◃ linvunitor g)
 • (f ◃ (unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ▹ g))) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
f
◃ ((linvunitor g • (unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ▹ g)) • μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
f
◃ ((linvunitor g • (unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ▹ g)) • μ₂) =
f ◃ id₂ g

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(linvunitor g • (unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ▹ g)) • μ₂ =
id₂ g

    exact (pr12 dm₂).
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(rinvunitor (f · g) • (f · g ◃ ηc)) • μc = id₂ (f · g)

  
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(rinvunitor (f · g) • (f · g ◃ ηc)) • μc = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(rinvunitor (f · g)
 • (f · g
    ◃ ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂))))
• ((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
        • (f
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • (f
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
     • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
    • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂)) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rinvunitor (f · g)
 • (f · g
    ◃ ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂))))
• ((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
        • (f
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • (f
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
     • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
    • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂)) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rinvunitor (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ (linvunitor (id₁ x) • ((η₁ ▹ id₁ x) • (f ◃ η₂))))
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rinvunitor (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ (linvunitor (id₁ x) • ((η₁ ▹ id₁ x) • (f ◃ η₂))))
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = ?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rinvunitor (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ (linvunitor (id₁ x) • ((η₁ ▹ id₁ x) • (f ◃ η₂))))
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · g
 ◃ (linvunitor (id₁ x) • ((η₁ ▹ id₁ x) • (f ◃ η₂))))
• (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
   • ((f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
      • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
         • ((f
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
            • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
               • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • (f ◃ μ₂))))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
f · g
◃ (linvunitor (id₁ x) • ((η₁ ▹ id₁ x) • (f ◃ η₂))) =
?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
f · g
◃ ((linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂)) =
?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x) = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
linvunitor (id₁ x) • id₂ (id₁ x) ⋆⋆ η₁ = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rinvunitor (id₁ x) • id₂ (id₁ x) ⋆⋆ η₁ = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
η₁ • rinvunitor f = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rinvunitor (f · g)
• ((f · g ◃ ((η₁ • rinvunitor f) • (f ◃ η₂)))
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f ◃ rinvunitor g) • lassociator f g (id₁ x))
• ((f · g ◃ ((η₁ • rinvunitor f) • (f ◃ η₂)))
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f ◃ rinvunitor g)
• (lassociator f g (id₁ x)
   • ((f · g ◃ (η₁ • (rinvunitor f • (f ◃ η₂))))
      • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                  • (lassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • ((μ₁
                         ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                        • (f ◃ μ₂))))))))) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f ◃ rinvunitor g)
• (lassociator f g (id₁ x)
   • ((f · g ◃ (η₁ • (rinvunitor f • (f ◃ η₂))))
      • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                  • (lassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • ((μ₁
                         ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                        • (f ◃ μ₂))))))))) = ?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f ◃ rinvunitor g)
• (lassociator f g (id₁ x)
   • ((f · g ◃ (η₁ • (rinvunitor f • (f ◃ η₂))))
      • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                  • (lassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • ((μ₁
                         ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                        • (f ◃ μ₂))))))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
lassociator f g (id₁ x)
• ((f · g ◃ (η₁ • (rinvunitor f • (f ◃ η₂))))
   • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
            • ((f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
               • (lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((lassociator f g (id₁ x)
       • (f · g ◃ ((η₁ • rinvunitor f) • (f ◃ η₂))))
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((((f ◃ (g ◃ ((η₁ • rinvunitor f) • (f ◃ η₂))))
       • lassociator f g (f · g))
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((((((f ◃ (g ◃ η₁)) • (f ◃ (g ◃ rinvunitor f)))
        • (f ◃ (g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))))
       • lassociator f g (f · g))
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f ◃ (g ◃ η₁))
• ((f ◃ (g ◃ rinvunitor f))
   • ((f ◃ (g ◃ (f ◃ η₂)))
      • (lassociator f g (f · g)
         • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
               • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                     • (lassociator f
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                        • ((μ₁
                            ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · g) • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f ◃ rinvunitor g)
• ((f ◃ (g ◃ η₁))
   • ((f ◃ (g ◃ rinvunitor f))
      • ((f ◃ (g ◃ (f ◃ η₂)))
         • (lassociator f g (f · g)
            • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                        • (lassociator f
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · g)
                           • ((μ₁
                               ▹ endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                              • (f ◃ μ₂))))))))))) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((f ◃ rinvunitor g) • (f ◃ (g ◃ η₁)))
         • (f ◃ (g ◃ rinvunitor f)))
        • (f ◃ (g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))))
       • lassociator f g (f · g))
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((((((f ◃ (rinvunitor g • (g ◃ η₁)))
         • (f ◃ (g ◃ rinvunitor f)))
        • (f ◃ (g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))))
       • lassociator f g (f · g))
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f ◃ (rinvunitor g • (g ◃ η₁)))
• ((f ◃ (g ◃ rinvunitor f))
   • ((f ◃ (g ◃ (f ◃ η₂)))
      • (lassociator f g (f · g)
         • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                     • (lassociator f
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                        • ((μ₁
                            ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · g) • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))))) =
id₂ (f · g)

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

• ((f ◃ (g ◃ rinvunitor f))
   • ((f ◃ (g ◃ (f ◃ η₂)))
      • (lassociator f g (f · g)

              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)

                        • ((μ₁
                            ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · g) • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f ◃ (rinvunitor g • (g ◃ η₁)))
• ((f ◃ (g ◃ rinvunitor f))
   • ((f ◃ (g ◃ (f ◃ η₂)))
      • (lassociator f g (f · g)
         • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
               • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
                     • (lassociator f
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                        • ((μ₁
                            ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · g) • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
lassociator f g (f · g)
• (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
   • ((f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
      • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
         • ((f
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
            • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
               • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • (f ◃ μ₂))))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((lassociator f g (f · g)
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((id₂
       (f
        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
           · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

(((((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f ◃ (rinvunitor g • (g ◃ η₁)))
• ((f ◃ (g ◃ rinvunitor f))
   • ((f ◃ (g ◃ (f ◃ η₂)))
      • ((((((f
              ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
             • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
            • (f
               ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
           • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
          • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
         • (f ◃ μ₂)))) = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

((((((((f ◃ (rinvunitor g • (g ◃ η₁)))
       • (f ◃ (g ◃ rinvunitor f)))
      • (f ◃ (g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((f
   ◃ ((((((rinvunitor g • (g ◃ η₁))
          • (g ◃ rinvunitor f)) • (g ◃ (f ◃ η₂)))
        • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) • (α ▹ g))
      • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ (rinvunitor g
    • ((g ◃ η₁)
       • ((g ◃ rinvunitor f)
          • ((g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))
             • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
                • ((α ▹ g)
                   • rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))))))
• (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
   • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) • (f ◃ μ₂))) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ (rinvunitor g
    • ((g ◃ η₁)
       • ((g ◃ rinvunitor f)
          • ((g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))
             • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
                • ((α ▹ g)
                   • rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))))))
• (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
   • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) • (μ₁ ▹ g))) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

(f
 ◃ (rinvunitor g
    • ((g ◃ η₁)
       • ((g ◃ rinvunitor f)
          • ((g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))
             • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
   • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) • (μ₁ ▹ g))) =
?b

   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
 • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)) • (μ₁ ▹ g) =

 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) • (μ₁ ▹ g) =

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂

(f
 ◃ (rinvunitor g
    • ((g ◃ η₁)

             • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

   • (μ₁ ▹ g)) = id₂ (f · g)

id₂ (f · g)

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ (rinvunitor g
    • ((g ◃ η₁)
       • ((g ◃ rinvunitor f)
          • ((g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))
             • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
                • ((α ▹ g)
                   • (rassociator
                        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
                      • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)))))))))
• (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g • (μ₁ ▹ g)) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ (rinvunitor g
    • ((g ◃ η₁)
       • ((g ◃ rinvunitor f)
          • ((g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))
             • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
                • ((α ▹ g)
                   • (rassociator
                        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
                      • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)))))))))
• (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g • (μ₁ ▹ g)) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ (rinvunitor g
    • ((g ◃ η₁)
       • ((g ◃ rinvunitor f)
          • ((g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))
             • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
                • ((α ▹ g)
                   • (rassociator
                        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
                      • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)))))))))
• (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g • (μ₁ ▹ g)) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
f
◃ (rinvunitor g
   • ((g ◃ η₁)
      • ((g ◃ rinvunitor f)
         • ((g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))
            • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
               • ((α ▹ g)
                  • (rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
                     • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)))))))) =
?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))
• (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
   • ((α ▹ g)
      • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
         • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((g ◃ (f ◃ η₂))
   • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) • (α ▹ g))
 • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
• (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (id₁ x)
   • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      ◃ η₂)) • (α ▹ g))
 • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
• (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (id₁ x)
• ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ η₂)
   • ((α ▹ g)
      • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
         • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ η₂)
• ((α ▹ g)
   • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
      • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ η₂)
  • (α ▹ g))
 • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
• (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) = ?t2

μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((α ▹ id₁ x)
  • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
     ◃ η₂))
 • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)

(α ▹ id₁ x)
• ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ η₂)
   • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

(rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (id₁ x)

    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ η₂)))

μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f

rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (id₁ x)
• ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ η₂))

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (id₁ x)
• (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ η₂) • μ₂)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ (rinvunitor g
    • ((g ◃ η₁)
       • ((g ◃ rinvunitor f)
          • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (id₁ x)
             • ((α ▹ id₁ x)
                • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (id₁ x)
                   • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ η₂)
                         • μ₂)))))))))
• (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g • (μ₁ ▹ g)) =
id₂ (f · g)

 ◃ (rinvunitor g
    • ((g ◃ η₁)

                         • μ₂)))))))))
• (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g • (μ₁ ▹ g)) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ (rinvunitor g
    • ((g ◃ η₁)
       • ((g ◃ rinvunitor f)
          • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (id₁ x)
             • ((α ▹ id₁ x)
                • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

                   • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)

                         • μ₂)))))))))
• (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g • (μ₁ ▹ g)) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
f
◃ (rinvunitor g
   • ((g ◃ η₁)
      • ((g ◃ rinvunitor f)
         • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (id₁ x)
            • ((α ▹ id₁ x)
               • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (id₁ x)
                  • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ η₂)
                        • μ₂)))))))) = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(g ◃ rinvunitor f)
• (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (id₁ x)
   • ((α ▹ id₁ x)
      • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (id₁ x)
         • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
            ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ η₂) • μ₂))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((g ◃ rinvunitor f)
   • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (id₁ x)) • (α ▹ id₁ x))
 • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (id₁ x))
• (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ η₂) • μ₂)) = ?t2

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((rinvunitor
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  • (α ▹ id₁ x))
 • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (id₁ x))
• (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ η₂) • μ₂)) = ?t2

    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  • id₂ (id₁ x) ⋆⋆ α)

rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
• ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ η₂) • μ₂) = ?t20

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

(rinvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
 • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ η₂)) • μ₂ = ?t20

        apply (pr122 dm₂).
      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ id₂ (pr12 (x,, pr1 dm₂)) = ?t2

      apply lwhisker_id2.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ (rinvunitor g
    • ((g ◃ η₁)
       • (α
          • id₂
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
               · pr12 (x,, pr1 dm₂))))))
• (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g • (μ₁ ▹ g)) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f ◃ (rinvunitor g • ((g ◃ η₁) • α)))
• (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g • (μ₁ ▹ g)) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f ◃ ((rinvunitor g • (g ◃ η₁)) • α))
 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) • (μ₁ ▹ g) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
