η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f ◃ ((rinvunitor g • (g ◃ η₁)) • α))
 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) • (μ₁ ▹ g) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f ◃ ((rinvunitor g • (g ◃ η₁)) • α))
 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) • (μ₁ ▹ g) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
f ◃ ((rinvunitor g • (g ◃ η₁)) • α) = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rinvunitor g • (g ◃ η₁)) • α = ?t2

      exact (!(unit_law_1_from_distr_law α)).
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f
  ◃ (linvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     • (unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))))
 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) • (μ₁ ▹ g) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((f ◃ linvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
  • (f
     ◃ (unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))))
 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) • (μ₁ ▹ g) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f ◃ linvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
• ((f
    ◃ (unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
   • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
      • (μ₁ ▹ g))) = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f ◃ linvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
• ((f
    ◃ (unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
   • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
      • (μ₁ ▹ g))) = ?b

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = id₂ (f · g)

      apply idpath.

(f ◃ linvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
• (lassociator f (id₁ x) g
   • (((f ◃ unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) • μ₁) ▹ g)) =
id₂ (f · g)

 • lassociator f (id₁ x) g)

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

(linvunitor (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ⋆⋆ id₂ f
 • lassociator f (id₁ x) g)
• (((f ◃ unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) • μ₁) ▹ g) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

id₂ g ⋆⋆ rinvunitor f
• (((f ◃ unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) • μ₁) ▹ g) =
id₂ (f · g)

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rinvunitor f ▹ g)
• (((f ◃ unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) • μ₁) ▹ g) =
id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rinvunitor f • ((f ◃ unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) • μ₁))
▹ g = id₂ (f · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rinvunitor f • ((f ◃ unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) • μ₁))
▹ g = id₂ f ▹ g

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rinvunitor f • ((f ◃ unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) • μ₁) =
id₂ f

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rinvunitor f • (f ◃ unit_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))) • μ₁ =
id₂ f

    apply (pr122 dm₁).
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g) • (f · g ◃ μc))
• μc = (μc ▹ f · g) • μc

  
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g) • (f · g ◃ μc))
• μc = (μc ▹ f · g) • μc

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
 • (f · g
    ◃ ((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
            • (f
               ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
           • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
          • (f
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
         • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
        • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂))))
• ((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
        • (f
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • (f
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
     • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
    • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂)) =
(((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
       • (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
     • (f
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
    • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
   • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂))
 ▹ f · g)
• ((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
        • (f
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • (f
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
     • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
    • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
 • (((((((f · g
          ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
         • (f · g
            ◃ (f
               ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
        • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g))))
       • (f · g
          ◃ (f
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
      • (f · g
         ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
     • (f · g ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
    • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ μ₂))))
• ((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
        • (f
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • (f
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
     • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
    • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂)) =
(((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g))
     • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g))
    • ((f
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g))
   • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g))
  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g))
 • ((f ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g))
• ((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
        • (f
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • (f
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
     • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
    • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
 • (((((((f · g
          ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
         • (f · g
            ◃ (f
               ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
        • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g))))
       • (f · g
          ◃ (f
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
      • (f · g
         ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
     • (f · g ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
    • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ μ₂))))
• ((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
        • (f
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • (f
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
     • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
    • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂)) =
(((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g))
     • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g))
    • ((f
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g))
   • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g))
  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g))
 • ((f ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g))
• ((((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
        • (f
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • (f
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
     • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
    • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ μ₂))
                     • (rassociator f
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                        • ((f
                            ◃ lassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                g)
                           • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                              • ((f
                                  ◃ rassociator ...
                                      ... g)
                                 • (lassociator f ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (((f ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g)
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g)
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ μ₂))
                     • (rassociator f
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                        • ((f
                            ◃ lassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                g)
                           • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                              • ((f
                                  ◃ rassociator ...
                                      ... g)
                                 • (lassociator f ...
                                      ... • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (((f ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g)
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g)
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

                     • (rassociator f

                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                        • ((f
                            ◃ lassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

                                g)
                           • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))

                  • (f ◃ μ₂))))))) = ?t2

 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g

     ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (f ◃ μ₂))

            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))

f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ μ₂))
• ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) • (f ◃ μ₂)) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
  ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ μ₂))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g))
 • (f ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ μ₂))) • (f ◃ μ₂) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g))
• ((f ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ μ₂)) • (f ◃ μ₂)) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g))
• (f ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ μ₂) • μ₂)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ μ₂) • μ₂ = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr12 (x,, pr1 dm₂)
         · pr2
             (pr1 (x,, pr1 dm₂),,
              pr12 (x,, pr1 dm₂))
         · pr2
             (pr1 (x,, pr1 dm₂),,
              pr12 (x,, pr1 dm₂)) ==>
         pr2
           (pr1 (x,, pr1 dm₂),, pr12 (x,, pr1 dm₂)),
   lassociator (pr12 (x,, pr1 dm₂))
     (pr2 (pr1 (x,, pr1 dm₂),, pr12 (x,, pr1 dm₂)))
     (pr2 (pr1 (x,, pr1 dm₂),, pr12 (x,, pr1 dm₂)))
   • z) (pr222 dm₂)
:
lassociator g g g
• ((rassociator g g g • (g ◃ μ₂)) • μ₂) =
lassociator g g g • ((μ₂ ▹ g) • μ₂): lassociator g g g
• ((rassociator g g g • (g ◃ μ₂)) • μ₂) =
lassociator g g g • ((μ₂ ▹ g) • μ₂)
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ μ₂) • μ₂ = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
p:= maponpaths
  (λ z : pr11 dm₂ · pr11 dm₂ · pr11 dm₂ ==>
         pr11 dm₂,
   lassociator (pr11 dm₂) (pr11 dm₂) (pr11 dm₂) • z)
  (pr222 dm₂): lassociator g g g
• ((rassociator g g g • (g ◃ μ₂)) • μ₂) =
lassociator g g g • ((μ₂ ▹ g) • μ₂)
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ μ₂) • μ₂ = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
p: ((lassociator g g g • rassociator g g g)
 • (g ◃ μ₂)) • μ₂ =
(lassociator g g g • (μ₂ ▹ g)) • μ₂
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ μ₂) • μ₂ = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
p: (g ◃ μ₂) • μ₂ =
(lassociator g g g • (μ₂ ▹ g)) • μ₂
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ μ₂) • μ₂ = ?t2

      exact p.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (((f ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g)
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g)
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (((f ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g)
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g)
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g))
• (f ◃ ((lassociator g g g • (μ₂ ▹ g)) • μ₂)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ ((lassociator g g g • (μ₂ ▹ g)) • μ₂)) • (μ₁ ▹ g) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (((f ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g)
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g)
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · g)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (((f ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g)
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g)
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

            • (((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                ▹ f · g)

                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g)
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

                  • ((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     • (f ◃ μ₂)))))))) = ?t2

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂) = 
?t2

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f

rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
p:= pr222 dm₁: (rassociator f f f • (f ◃ μ₁)) • μ₁ =
(μ₁ ▹ f) • μ₁
(((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) • μ₁)
 ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) • (f ◃ μ₂) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
p:= pr222 dm₁: (rassociator f f f • (f ◃ μ₁)) • μ₁ =
(μ₁ ▹ f) • μ₁
(((μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) • μ₁)
 ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) • (f ◃ μ₂) = ?b

(μ₁ ▹ f) • μ₁
?b = ?t2

▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g = ?y'

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

        exact (!p).
      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

 ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) • (f ◃ μ₂) = ?t2

 ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) • (f ◃ μ₂) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
