(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ μ₂) • (((rassociator f f f • (f ◃ μ₁)) • μ₁) ▹ g) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ μ₂)
• (((rassociator f f f ▹ g) • ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ g))
   • (μ₁ ▹ g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ μ₂)
• ((rassociator f f f ▹ g)
   • (((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ g) • (μ₁ ▹ g))) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (rassociator
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ (α ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ rassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                g)
                           • (lassociator
                                (f · endo_of_mnd (...))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                              • ((... · ... ◃ μ₂)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) • ((...) ▹ f · g))
          • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd ...) (... · g)
             ▹ f · g))
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...) ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g))
        • rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
       • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
     • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
    • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
   • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂))
  • (rassociator f f f ▹ g)) • ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ g))
• (μ₁ ▹ g) =
((((((((((((rassociator ... ... ... • (...))
           • (f · g ◃ (...))) • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ (...))))
         • (f · g
            ◃ (f
               ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd ...)
                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g)))
        • (f · g
           ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
       • (f · g ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (f · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g)))
 • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ ((lassociator g g g • (μ₂ ▹ g)) • μ₂)))
• (μ₁ ▹ g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) • ((...) ▹ f · g))
          • ((f ◃ rassociator ... ... g) ▹ f · g))
         • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (...) · g) ▹ f · g))
        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g))
       • rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
     • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
    • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
   • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
  • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
     ◃ μ₂)) • (rassociator f f f ▹ g))
• ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ g) =
(((((((((((rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
           • (f · g ◃ rassociator f ... ...))
          • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ lassociator ... ... g)))
         • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g))))
        • (f · g
           ◃ (f
              ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
       • (f · g
          ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
      • (f · g ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
     • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (f · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
    • (f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
   • (f ◃ (α ▹ g · g)))
  • (f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)))
 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g)))
• (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
   ◃ ((lassociator g g g • (μ₂ ▹ g)) • μ₂))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) • ((...) ▹ f · g))
          • ((f ◃ rassociator ... ... g) ▹ f · g))
         • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (...) · g) ▹ f · g))
        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g))
       • rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
     • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
    • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
   • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
  • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
     ◃ μ₂)) • (rassociator f f f ▹ g))
• ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ g) =
(((((((((((rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
           • (f · g ◃ rassociator f ... ...))
          • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ lassociator ... ... g)))
         • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g))))
        • (f · g
           ◃ (f
              ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
       • (f · g
          ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
      • (f · g ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
     • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (f · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
    • (f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
   • (f ◃ (α ▹ g · g)))
  • (f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)))
 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g)))
• (((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ lassociator g g g)
    • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (μ₂ ▹ g)))
   • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (rassociator
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ (α ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ rassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                g)
                           • (lassociator
                                (f · endo_of_mnd (...))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                              • ((... · ... ◃ μ₂)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (rassociator
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ (α ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ rassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                g)
                           • (lassociator
                                (f · endo_of_mnd (...))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                              • ((... · ... ◃ μ₂)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (rassociator
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ (α ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ rassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                g)
                           • (lassociator
                                (f · endo_of_mnd (...))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                              • ((... · ... ◃ μ₂)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ μ₂) • ((rassociator f f f ▹ g) • ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ g)) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
  ◃ μ₂) • (rassociator f f f ▹ g)) • ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ g) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((rassociator f f f ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
 • (f · (f · f) ◃ μ₂)) • ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ g) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f f f ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
• ((f · (f · f) ◃ μ₂) • ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f f f ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
• (((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
   • (f · f ◃ μ₂)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (rassociator
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ (α ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ rassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                g)
                           • (lassociator
                                (f · endo_of_mnd (...))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                              • ((rassociator f f f
                                  ▹ ... · g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) • ((...) ▹ f · g))
          • ((f ◃ rassociator ... ... g) ▹ f · g))
         • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (...) · g) ▹ f · g))
        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g))
       • rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
     • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
    • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
   • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
  • (rassociator f f f ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
• (f · f ◃ μ₂) =
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) • (f · g ◃ (...)))
          • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ rassociator ... ... g)))
         • (f · g
            ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)))
        • (f · g ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
       • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (f · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
      • (f
         ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
     • (f ◃ (α ▹ g · g)))
    • (f
       ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)))
   • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g)))
  • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ lassociator g g g))
 • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (μ₂ ▹ g)))
• (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((((((((rassociator f ... ... ▹ f · g)
           • ((...) ▹ f · g)) • ((f ◃ (...)) ▹ f · g))
         • ((f
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd ...)
                 (endo_of_mnd ...) g) ▹ f · g))
        • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g))
       • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g))
      • rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (rassociator f f f ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
• ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) =
((((((((((((rassociator ... ... ... • (...))
           • (f · g ◃ (...))) • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ (...))))
         • (f · g
            ◃ (f
               ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd ...)
                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g)))
        • (f · g
           ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
       • (f · g ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (f · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g)))
 • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ lassociator g g g))
• (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (μ₂ ▹ g))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (rassociator
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ (α ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ rassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                g)
                           • (lassociator
                                (f · endo_of_mnd (...))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                              • ((rassociator f f f
                                  ▹ ... · g)
                                 • ((...) ▹ ... · g)))))))))))) =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (rassociator
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ (α ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ rassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                g)
                           • (lassociator
                                (f · endo_of_mnd (...))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                              • ((rassociator f f f
                                  ▹ ... · g)
                                 • ((...) ▹ ... · g)))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂)
                ▹ f · g)
               • (rassociator
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ (α ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ rassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                g)
                           • (lassociator
                                (f · endo_of_mnd (...))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                              • ((rassociator f f f
                                  ▹ ... · g)
                                 • ((...) ▹ ... · g)))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g)
• (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
   • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
      • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (α ▹ g))
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
            • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
               • ((rassociator f f f
                   ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                  • ((f ◃ μ₁)
                     ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g)
      • rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (rassociator f f f ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
• ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

((((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ μ₂) ▹ f · g)
  • rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
 • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
• (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (α ▹ g)) = ?y'

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

((rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)

rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)

 ◃ (μ₂ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
   • (((μ₂ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) • α) ▹ g)) = ?t2

     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
   • ((((((rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α))
          • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
         • (α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
        • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
       • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          ◃ mult_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))) ▹ g)) = ?t2

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (((((rassociator
                     (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
                   • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                       ◃ lassociator (... · g)
                           (endo_of_mnd ...) g)
                      • ((f · ... ◃ (...))
                         • ((...) • (...)))))
                  • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     ◃ rassociator
                         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
                 • lassociator
                     (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                • (rassociator f f f
                   ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))))) =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)

                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))

                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ g))
                              • ((f · ... ◃ (...))
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f

                         ◃ lassociator

                               ◃ rassociator

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ g))
                              • ((f · ... ◃ (...))
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f · g
                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ g))
                              • ((f · ... ◃ (...))
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ mult_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
   • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
      • ((rassociator f f f
          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
         • ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ mult_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       ▹ g))
   • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (rassociator f f f ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
• ((f ◃ μ₁) ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) = ?t2

       ▹ g)

  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

  ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
 • (f · (f · f) ◃ (mult_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ▹ g)))

 ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
• ((f · (f · f) ◃ (mult_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ▹ g))

 ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
• (((f ◃ μ₁)
    ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · g) • (f · f ◃ (mult_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ▹ g))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ g))

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((((...) • (...))
           • rassociator (f · ...) (... · g) (... · g))
          • (f · endo_of_mnd (...)
             ◃ lassociator (... · g) (endo_of_mnd ...)
                 g))
         • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
            ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd ...)
                 (endo_of_mnd ...) (endo_of_mnd ...)
               ▹ g)))
        • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
           ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g)))
       • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g)))

         ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g)))
     • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g)))
    • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
   • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        · g))
  • (rassociator f f f
     ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       · g))
 • ((f ◃ μ₁)
    ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · g)) • (f · f ◃ (mult_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ▹ g)) =
((((((((((((rassociator ... ... ... • (...))
           • (f · g ◃ (...))) • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ (...))))
         • (f · g
            ◃ (f
               ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd ...)
                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g)))
        • (f · g
           ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))

      • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (f · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g)))
 • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ lassociator g g g))
• (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (μ₂ ▹ g))

x: B

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f

                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • (f · ...
                                    ◃ lassociator g g
                                        g)))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)

                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)

                            ▹ g))

                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)

                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ g))
                              • ((f · ... ◃ (...))
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

                   ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • (rassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (f
                        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (lassociator f
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (... · ...)
                                 • (f · ...
                                    ◃ lassociator g g
                                        g)))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · g ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
• (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (f · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
      • ((f ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
         • ((f
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g))
            • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g))
               • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                  ◃ lassociator g g g)))))) = ?t2

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((f · g ◃ (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
     • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (f · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))

       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g)))
• (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ lassociator g g g) =
?t2

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g)))

?t2

B: bicat
x: B

α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ μ₁) • α = ?t20

        exact (!(mu_law_1_from_distr_law α)).
      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g

   ◃ ((((((lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           • (α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
          • rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
         • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ α))
        • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
       • (mult_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))) ▹ g · g))
  • (f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)))
 • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g)))
• (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ lassociator g g g) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f

                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • (rassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (f · f) (g · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (lassociator
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                            ▹ g · g))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd ...)
                               ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ (rassociator ... ...
                                    ... ▹ g · g))
                              • ((f ◃ (...))
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ g))
                              • ((f · ... ◃ (...))
                                 • ((...) • (...)))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((((...) • (...))
           • (f · g ◃ lassociator f ... ...))
          • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (f · endo_of_mnd ... · (... · g)))
         • (f
            ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                (f · f) (g · g)))
        • (f
           ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

      • (f
         ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

       ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)))
  • lassociator f
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g)))
 • (f
    · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
    ◃ lassociator g g g))
• ((f ◃ mult_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g · g) =
(((((((((((((...) • (...))
           • (lassociator f ... ... ▹ f · g))
          • rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (...))
              (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
              (endo_of_mnd (...) · g))
         • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
            ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
        • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
           ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g)))
       • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g)))
      • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g)))
     • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g)))
    • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g)))

      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))

       · g))

    ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · g))
• ((f ◃ μ₁)
   ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g

          • (f · g
             ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd ...)
                 (... · g)))

         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)))

     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g)))
• (f · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
   ◃ lassociator g g g) =

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ g))
                              • ((f · ... ◃ (...))
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • (rassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (f · f) (g · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (lassociator
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                            ▹ g · g))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd ...)
                               ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ (rassociator ... ...
                                    ... ▹ g · g))
                              • (f ◃ ((...) ▹ g · g))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ g))
                              • ((f · ... ◃ (...))
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        g)
   • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         · g)
      • ((rassociator f f f
          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
         • ((f
             · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             ◃ rassociator g g g)
            • (rassociator f
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g))
                  • (f
                     ◃ (rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                        ▹ g · g)))))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        g)
   • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         · g)
      • ((rassociator f f f
          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
         • ((f
             · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             ◃ rassociator g g g)
            • (rassociator f
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g))
                  • (f
                     ◃ (rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                        ▹ g · g)))))))) = ?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

?b = ?t2

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

 ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        g)
   • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         · g)
      • ((rassociator f f f
          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
         • ((f
             · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             ◃ rassociator g g g)
            • (rassociator f
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g))

                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                        ▹ g · g)))))))) = ?b

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g))
• ((f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g))
   • (f
      ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g))) = ?t20

α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g))

    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
