μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (g · g))
 • lassociator
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g) ⋆⋆ id₂ f)
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t20

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(lassociator
   (f
    · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)
 • (id₂ (g · g)
    ⋆⋆ rassociator f
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    • rassociator f
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t20

α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

(lassociator
   (f
    · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)
 • ((rassociator f
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)
    • rassociator f
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t20

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
lassociator
  (f · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)
• ((rassociator f
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)
   • (rassociator f
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)
      • (f
         ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)))) =
?t20

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f

(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        g)
   • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         · g)
      • ((rassociator f f f
          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
         • ((f
             · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             ◃ rassociator g g g)
            • (lassociator
                 (f
                  · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (g · g)
               • ((rassociator f
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)

                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (g · g)
                     • (f
                        ◃ (rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           ▹ g · g))))))))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f

(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        g)

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = ?t2

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) g g
    • id₂
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         · (g · g))))
• (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (g · g)
   • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)
      • rassociator f
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
           · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))) (g · g))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) g g)
• (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (g · g)
   • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)
      • rassociator f
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
           · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))) (g · g))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ g))
                              • ((f · ...
                                  ◃ rassociator ... g
                                      g)
                                 • (lassociator ...
                                      ... ... • (...))))))))))))) =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • (rassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (f · f) (g · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (lassociator
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                            ▹ g · g))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd ...)
                               ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ (rassociator ... ...
                                    ... ▹ g · g))
                              • (f ◃ ((...) ▹ g · g))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ g))
                              • ((f · ...
                                  ◃ rassociator ... g
                                      g)
                                 • (lassociator ...
                                      ... ... • (...))))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • (rassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (f · f) (g · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (lassociator
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                            ▹ g · g))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd ...)
                               ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ (rassociator ... ...
                                    ... ▹ g · g))
                              • (f ◃ ((...) ▹ g · g))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ ((...) ▹ g))
                              • ((f · ...
                                  ◃ rassociator ... g
                                      g)
                                 • (lassociator ...
                                      ... ... • (...))))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) g g)
   • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (g · g)
      • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)
         • rassociator f
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
              · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                 · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))) (g · g)))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
   • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) g g))
  • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (g · g))
 • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    ▹ g · g))
• rassociator f
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
    (g · g) = ?t2

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

(((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
   ◃ (((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g)

      (g · g))

    ▹ g · g))

     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
    (g · g) = ?t2

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

    ▹ g · g))

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
• (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (g · g)
   • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g · g)
      • rassociator f
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
           · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))) (g · g))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ (α ▹ g · g))
  • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (g · g))
 • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    ▹ g · g))
• rassociator f
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
    (g · g) = ?t2

   · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (... · ...) g g)
                              • (lassociator (f · ...)
                                   (... · ...) (g · g)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • (rassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (f · f) (g · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (lassociator
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                            ▹ g · g))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd ...)
                               ▹ g · g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ (rassociator ... ...
                                    ... ▹ g · g))
                              • (f ◃ ((...) ▹ g · g))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) • ((...) ▹ f · g))
          • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd ...) (... · g)
             ▹ f · g))
         • rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
        • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g)))
      • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g)))
     • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g)))
    • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g g))
   • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (g · g))
  • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     ▹ g · g))
 • rassociator f
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
     (g · g))
• (f ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ α) ▹ g · g)) =
((((((((((rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
          • (f · g
             ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd ...)
                 (... · g)))
         • (f · g
            ◃ (f
               ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd ...)
                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g)))
        • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g))))
       • (f · g
          ◃ (f
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
      • (f · g
         ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
     • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
    • (f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (f · f)
           (g · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
  • (f ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
 • (f
    ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
• (f ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) ◃ α) ▹ g · g))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((((...) • (...)) • ((...) ▹ f · g))
          • ((f ◃ rassociator ... ... g) ▹ f · g))
         • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (...) · g) ▹ f · g))
        • rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
       • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g)))
     • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g)))
    • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g)))
   • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      ◃ rassociator
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g g))
  • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (g · g))
 • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
    ▹ g · g))
• rassociator f
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)))
    (g · g) =
(((((((((rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
         • (f · g
            ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)))
        • (f · g
           ◃ (f
              ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
       • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g))))
      • (f · g
         ◃ (f
            ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
     • (f · g
        ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
    • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (f · f)
          (g · g)))
  • (f
     ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
 • (f ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (... · ...) g g)
                              • (lassociator (f · ...)
                                   (... · ...) (g · g)
                                 • ((...)
                                    • rassociator f
                                        ... ...)))))))))))) =
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • (rassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (f · f) (g · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (lassociator
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                            ▹ g · g))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd ...)
                               ▹ g · g))
                           • (f
                              ◃ (rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 ▹ g · g)))))))))))

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))

                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (f · f) (g · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (lassociator
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                            ▹ g · g))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd ...)
                               ▹ g · g))
                           • (f
                              ◃ (rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 ▹ g · g))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (... · ...) g g)
                              • (lassociator (f · ...)
                                   (... · ...) (g · g)
                                 • ((...)
                                    • rassociator f
                                        ... ...))))))))))))

    
B: bicat

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• ((f · g
    ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f · g
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ (f
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f · g
                ◃ lassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))

                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (f · f) (g · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (lassociator
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                            ▹ g · g))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd ...)
                               ▹ g · g))

                              ◃ (rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 ▹ g · g))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · g
 ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
• ((f · g
    ◃ (f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
   • ((f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • ((f · g
          ◃ (f
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
         • ((f · g
             ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
            • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                  · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (f · f)
                       (g · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                         ▹ g · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                            ▹ g · g))
                        • (f
                           ◃ (rassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              ▹ g · g)))))))))) = 
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((f · g
         ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
        • (f · g
           ◃ (f
              ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
       • (f · g ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g))))
      • (f · g
         ◃ (f
            ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
     • (f · g
        ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
    • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (f · f)
          (g · g)))
  • (f
     ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
 • (f ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

     ◃ ((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
           • (f
              ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

          • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • (f

        • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

    • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (f · f)
          (g · g)))
  • (f
     ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
 • (f ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
    • (f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ ((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)
                • (f
                   ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd ...)
                       (endo_of_mnd ...) g))
               • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
              • (f
                 ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
             • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))))
   • (f
      ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (f · f)
          (g · g)))
  • (f
     ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
 • (f ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
    • (((((f
           ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
              ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (...) · g)))
          • (f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ (f
                   ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd ...)
                       (endo_of_mnd ...) g))))
         • (f
            ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))))
        • (f
           ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
              ◃ (f
                 ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))))
       • (f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))))
   • (f
      ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (f · f)
          (g · g)))
  • (f
     ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
 • (f ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
  (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
   · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
• ((f
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ (f
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
      • ((f ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g))))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ (f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ lassociator f
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (f · f)
                       (g · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                         ▹ g · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                            ▹ g · g))
                        • (f
                           ◃ (rassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              ▹ g · g)))))))))) = 
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ (f
                ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g))))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ (f
                      ◃ rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · (g · g)))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ ((α
                          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            · (g · g))
                         • lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)))
                     • (f
                        ◃ (rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           ▹ g · g))))))))) =
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (... · ...) g g)
                              • (lassociator (f · ...)
                                   (... · ...) (g · g)
                                 • ((...)
                                    • rassociator f
                                        ... ...))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ (f
                ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g))))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ (f
                      ◃ rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · (g · g)))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ ((α
                          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            · (g · g))
                         • lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)))
                     • (f
                        ◃ (rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           ▹ g · g))))))))) = ?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (... · ...) g g)
                              • (lassociator (f · ...)
                                   (... · ...) (g · g)
                                 • ((...)
                                    • rassociator f
                                        ... ...))))))))))))

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)

         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (f ◃ (α ▹ g))))
            • ((f

                   ◃ (f
                      ◃ rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · (g · g)))
                  • ((f

                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           ▹ g · g))))))))) = ?b

              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
               · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
         • (f
            ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
    ◃ (α ▹ g)))
• ((f
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
   • ((f
       ◃ lassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
      • (f
         ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
• (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ (f
                ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
         • ((f
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
            • ((f
                ◃ (α
                   ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                     · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                      ◃ (α ▹ g)))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g))
                        • (f
                           ◃ (rassociator
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              ▹ g · g)))))))))) =
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • (((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
      • (((f
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
         • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (rassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α)
                            ▹ g))
                        • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            ◃ (lassociator
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...) ▹ g))
                           • ((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (... · ...) g g)
                              • (lassociator (f · ...)
                                   (... · ...) (g · g)
                                 • ((...)
                                    • rassociator f
                                        ... ...))))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f
  ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
• ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
   • (rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
      • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ (f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ (α
                         ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                            ◃ (α ▹ g)))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ (endo_of_mnd (...)
                               · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ lassociator
                                   (... · ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (f
                                 ◃ (rassociator ...
                                      ... ... ▹ g · g)))))))))))) =
((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             g g)
                        • (lassociator
                             (f
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)
                           • ((rassociator f
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (... · ...) ▹ g · g)
                              • rassociator f
                                  (endo_of_mnd (...)
                                   · (... · ...))
                                  (g · g)))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f
  ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
• ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
   • (rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
      • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ (f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ (α
                         ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                            ◃ (α ▹ g)))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ (endo_of_mnd (...)
                               · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ lassociator
                                   (... · ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (f
                                 ◃ (rassociator ...
                                      ... ... ▹ g · g)))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             g g)
                        • (lassociator
                             (f
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)
                           • ((rassociator f
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (... · ...) ▹ g · g)
                              • rassociator f
                                  (endo_of_mnd (...)
                                   · (... · ...))
                                  (g · g)))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f
  ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
• ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
   • (rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
      • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ (f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ (α
                         ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)

                         ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                            ◃ (α ▹ g)))

                            ◃ (endo_of_mnd (...)
                               · endo_of_mnd (...)

                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ lassociator
                                   (... · ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (f
                                 ◃ (rassociator ...
                                      ... ... ▹ g · g)))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((((((((f ◃ rassociator ... ... g) ▹ f · g)
          • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd ...) (... · g)
             ▹ f · g))
         • rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g))
        • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
       • (f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))))
      • (f
         ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            ◃ (f
               ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))))
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
    • (f
       ◃ (α
          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((f
       ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
     • (lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g))
    • rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g))
   • rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))))
 • (f
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       ◃ (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))))
• (f
   ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        · g)) = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f
  ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) ▹ f · g)
• ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g) ▹ f · g)
   • (rassociator (f · g) (f · g) (f · g)
      • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator f
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ (f
                      ◃ lassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
               • (f
                  ◃ lassociator
                      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                       · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))))))) =
?y'

        · g)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
f
◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
   • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) f
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ (f
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
         • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
f
◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
   • (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) f
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
         • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
            ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
• (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) f
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
    · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
 • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
• (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
   ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
id₂
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
   · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
• (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
   ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g) = ?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)

        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
