             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))) = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))) = ?y'

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((rassociator f
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        · g) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • ((f
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
        • (f
           ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
              ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))))
    • (f
       ◃ (α
          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) =
((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             g g)
                        • (lassociator
                             (f
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)
                           • ((rassociator f
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (... · ...) ▹ g · g)
                              • rassociator f
                                  (endo_of_mnd (...)
                                   · (... · ...))
                                  (g · g)))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (α
             ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
               · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
                  • (f
                     ◃ (rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        ▹ g · g)))))))) =
((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             g g)
                        • (lassociator
                             (f
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)
                           • ((rassociator f
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (... · ...) ▹ g · g)
                              • rassociator f
                                  (endo_of_mnd (...)
                                   · (... · ...))
                                  (g · g)))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (α
             ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
               · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
                  • (f
                     ◃ (rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        ▹ g · g)))))))) = ?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             g g)
                        • (lassociator
                             (f
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)
                           • ((rassociator f
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (... · ...) ▹ g · g)
                              • rassociator f
                                  (endo_of_mnd (...)
                                   · (... · ...))
                                  (g · g)))))))))))

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (α
             ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
               · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
                  • (f
                     ◃ (rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        ▹ g · g)))))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
• ((f
    ◃ (α
       ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
         • ((f
             ◃ lassociator
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
            • (f
               ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f
       ◃ (α
          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((f
    ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
       • (α
          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((f
    ◃ ((α
        ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
       • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ ((α
     ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
    • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
• ((f
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
               · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
         • (f
            ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ ((α
           ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
          • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
               • (f
                  ◃ (rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))))))) =
((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             g g)
                        • (lassociator
                             (f
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)
                           • ((rassociator f
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (... · ...) ▹ g · g)
                              • rassociator f
                                  (endo_of_mnd (...)
                                   · (... · ...))
                                  (g · g)))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ ((α
           ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
          • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
               • (f
                  ◃ (rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             g g)
                        • (lassociator
                             (f
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)
                           • ((rassociator f
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (... · ...) ▹ g · g)
                              • rassociator f
                                  (endo_of_mnd (...)
                                   · (... · ...))
                                  (g · g)))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ ((α

             · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
          • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
               • (f
                  ◃ (rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
• ((f
    ◃ ((α
        ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
       • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
         • ((f
             ◃ lassociator
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
            • (f
               ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))))) =
?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
    • (f
       ◃ ((α
           ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
          • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((f
    ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · f)
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
       • ((α
           ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
          • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

((((f
    ◃ ((((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)

     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)

            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))

    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((f
      ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ rassociator
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
    • (f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
• ((f
    ◃ rassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
               • (f
                  ◃ (rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))))))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
                  • (f
                     ◃ (rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        ▹ g · g)))))))) =
((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             g g)
                        • (lassociator
                             (f
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)
                           • ((rassociator f
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (... · ...) ▹ g · g)
                              • rassociator f
                                  (endo_of_mnd (...)
                                   · (... · ...))
                                  (g · g)))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
                  • (f
                     ◃ (rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        ▹ g · g)))))))) = ?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             g g)
                        • (lassociator
                             (f
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)
                           • ((rassociator f
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (... · ...) ▹ g · g)
                              • rassociator f
                                  (endo_of_mnd (...)
                                   · (... · ...))
                                  (g · g)))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))

                     ◃ (rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        ▹ g · g)))))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((rassociator f
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         · g) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • (f
         ◃ ((α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
     • (f
        ◃ rassociator
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
    • (f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((((((f ◃ (α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
       ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • rassociator f
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ rassociator
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
    • (f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f ◃ (α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
 ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• (rassociator f
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
   • ((f
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
                  • (f
                     ◃ (rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        ▹ g · g)))))))) = ?b

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f ◃ (α ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)))
 ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• (rassociator f
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
   • ((f
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
            • ((f
                ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ lassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
                  • (f
                     ◃ (rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        ▹ g · g)))))))) =
((f ◃ (α ▹ g)) ▹ f · g)
• (((f
     ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
   • ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
      • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
            • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ (lassociator
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
                     • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         ◃ rassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             g g)
                        • (lassociator
                             (f
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                             (g · g)
                           • ((rassociator f
                                 (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                 (... · ...) ▹ g · g)
                              • rassociator f
                                  (endo_of_mnd (...)
                                   · (... · ...))
                                  (g · g)))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
   · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ rassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
               • (f
                  ◃ (rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))))))) =
((f
  ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
• ((lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
   • (rassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
         • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
            • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
               • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                   ◃ (lassociator
                        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
                  • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                      ◃ rassociator
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
                          g)
                     • (lassociator
                          (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                          (g · g)
                        • ((rassociator f
                              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                              (endo_of_mnd (...)
                               · endo_of_mnd (...))
                            ▹ g · g)
                           • rassociator f
                               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                                · (endo_of_mnd (...)
                                   · endo_of_mnd (...)))
                               (g · g))))))))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
    ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
   • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
         • (((f
              ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator f
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                            ◃ (α ▹ g)))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ (endo_of_mnd (...)
                               · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ lassociator
                                   (... · ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (f
                                 ◃ (rassociator ...
                                      ... ... ▹ g · g)))))))))))) =
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
   • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g g)
      • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)
         • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)
            • rassociator f
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                 · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                    · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))) (g · g)))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
    ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
   • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
         • (((f
              ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator f
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                            ◃ (α ▹ g)))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ (endo_of_mnd (...)
                               · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ lassociator
                                   (... · ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (f
                                 ◃ (rassociator ...
                                      ... ... ▹ g · g)))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
   • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g g)
      • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)
         • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)
            • rassociator f
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                 · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                    · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))) (g · g)))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
    ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
   • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
         • (((f
              ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
            • (rassociator f
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
                  • ((f
                      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                         · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                         ◃ lassociator
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
                     • ((f
                         ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                            ◃ (α ▹ g)))
                        • ((f
                            ◃ (endo_of_mnd (...)
                               · endo_of_mnd (...)
                               ◃ rassociator
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...) g))
                           • ((f
                               ◃ lassociator
                                   (... · ...)
                                   (endo_of_mnd ...)
                                   (g · g))
                              • (f
                                 ◃ (rassociator ...
                                      ... ... ▹ g · g)))))))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((((((f · endo_of_mnd (...)
           ◃ (lassociator ... ... ... ▹ g))
          • (f · endo_of_mnd (...)
             ◃ rassociator (... · g) (endo_of_mnd ...)
                 g))
         • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
        • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g))
       • ((f
           ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g))
      • rassociator f
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
     • (f
        ◃ rassociator
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
    • (f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(((((((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g))
      • (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
     • lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
    • (rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g))
   • ((f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g))
  • rassociator f
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
 • (f
    ◃ rassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)) = ?y'

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = ?y'

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

 ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
    ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
   • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                  · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

                            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((f
  ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g) ▹ f · g)
• (rassociator f
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)

       ◃ rassociator

           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))

            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))) = ?t2

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g

((rassociator f
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)

        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))

   ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)

          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
• ((f
    ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
       ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
   • ((f

            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • (f
         ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

 ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
                   ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
               • ((f

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
    ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
   • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
      • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
         • (rassociator f
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
               · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
            • ((f
                ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
                   ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
                  • (f
                     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                        ◃ lassociator
                            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = ?y'

      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

      • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))

              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)

            • ((f
                ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
                   ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
               • ((f
                   ◃ rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                        · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

                            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)))))))) =

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g) ▹ f · g)
• (rassociator f
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
   • ((f
       ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g
          ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))

          ◃ rassociator

              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
         • (f
            ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
               · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
               ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))))) =
?t2

        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)))
