B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (g · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
• ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       ◃ rassociator g (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
   • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))) = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (g · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
• ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       ◃ rassociator g (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
   • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))) = ?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b = ?y'

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (g · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
• ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       ◃ rassociator g (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
   • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
             (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))) = ?b

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
    ◃ rassociator g (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
• (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
   ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
   ◃ (rassociator g (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g
      • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
   ◃ id₂
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
        · g)) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
id₂
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
   · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
      · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
         · g))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (g · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
• id₂
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
     · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
           · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))) = ?y'

      apply id2_right.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) · g)
    • (f
       ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (g · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g)
          • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
               · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) =
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
   • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g g)
      • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)
         • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)
            • rassociator f
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                 · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                    · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))) (g · g)))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) · g)
    • ((f
        ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
           ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
               (g · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
       • (f
          ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
               · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))))
   • (f
      ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
         ◃ (α ▹ g))))
  • (f
     ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
        ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
 • (f
    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) =
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
   • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g g)
      • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)
         • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)
            • rassociator f
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                 · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                    · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))) (g · g)))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
   · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
   · g)
• ((f
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (g · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
   • ((f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
               • (f
                  ◃ (rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))))))) =
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
   • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g g)
      • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)
         • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)
            • rassociator f
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                 · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                    · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))) (g · g)))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
   · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
   · g)
• ((f
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (g · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
   • ((f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
               • (f
                  ◃ (rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
   • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g g)
      • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)
         • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)
            • rassociator f
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                 · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                    · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))) (g · g)))))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
   · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
   · g)
• ((f
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (g · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
   • ((f
       ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g))
      • ((f
          ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
         • ((f
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
            • ((f
                ◃ lassociator
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                     · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
               • (f
                  ◃ (rassociator
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))))))) =
?b

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(f
 ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
      · g))
• ((f
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
       ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • ((f
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
          · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
          ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
               · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
         • (f
            ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                 (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))))) =
?t2

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

    ◃ lassociator
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
• (f
   ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x

m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

   ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))

        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)) = ?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
   · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
   · g)
• ((f
    ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (g · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
   • ((((f
         ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
             ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ (α ▹ g)))
            • lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                 · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)))
        • (f
           ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
              · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
              ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
                  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)))
       • (f
          ◃ lassociator
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
               · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)))
      • (f
         ◃ (rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
              (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)))) =
(f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) ◃ α) ▹ g))
• ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
         (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) ▹ g))
   • ((f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
       ◃ rassociator
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g g)
      • (lassociator (f · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
            · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)
         • ((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
               (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g)
            • rassociator f
                (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
                 · (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
                    · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))) (g · g)))))

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g

 ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
     (g · g))

(lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
   (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
 • (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
• lassociator
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g)

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
(endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
 ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g g))
• ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)
    ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))
   • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (g · g)
      • (lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))) =
lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
• ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
   • lassociator
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))

    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

 ◃ (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)

           (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) ▹ g · g))) = ?b
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
?b =
lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
• ((endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
    ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
        (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)
   • lassociator
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g))

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B

  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · (g · g))
• lassociator
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
    (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) (g · g) = ?t2

      apply idpath.

B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧

μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g · g)
• (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
   ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g g) =
lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
  (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)
• (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)
   ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
mnd B

     • (f

mnd_data B
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B

       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f

      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
is_mnd B ?m

       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))

 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
mnd_data B
 
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
B
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
B ⟦ ?x, ?x ⟧
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
id₁ ?x ==> ?f
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
?f · ?f ==> ?f

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
B
 exact x.
      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
B ⟦ x, x ⟧
 exact (f · g).
      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
id₁ x ==> f · g
 exact ηc.
      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
 exact μc.
    
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
is_mnd B (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)
 
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(linvunitor (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
 • (pr122 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)
    ▹ pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)))
• pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc) =
id₂ (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(rinvunitor (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
 • (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)
    ◃ pr122 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)))
• pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc) =
id₂ (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(rassociator (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
   (pr2
      (pr1 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc),,
       pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)))
   (pr2
      (pr1 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc),,
       pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)))
 • (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)
    ◃ pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)))
• pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc) =
(pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)
 ▹ pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
• pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)

      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(linvunitor (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
 • (pr122 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)
    ▹ pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)))
• pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc) =
id₂ (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
 exact compose_mnd_unit_left.
      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(rinvunitor (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
 • (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)
    ◃ pr122 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)))
• pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc) =
id₂ (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
 exact compose_mnd_unit_right.
      
B: bicat
x: B
dm₁, dm₂: disp_mnd B x
α: distr_law dm₁ dm₂
m₁:= x,, dm₁: mnd B
m₂:= x,, dm₂: mnd B
f:= endo_of_mnd m₁: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
g:= endo_of_mnd m₂: B ⟦ x, x ⟧
η₁:= unit_of_mnd m₁: id₁ x ==> f
η₂:= unit_of_mnd m₂: id₁ x ==> g
μ₁:= mult_of_mnd m₁: f · f ==> f
μ₂:= mult_of_mnd m₂: g · g ==> g
ηc:= (linvunitor (id₁ x) • (η₁ ▹ id₁ x)) • (f ◃ η₂): id₁ x ==> f · g
μc:= (((((rassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
       (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁) · g)
     • (f
        ◃ lassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂))
            (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁)) g))
    • (f ◃ (α ▹ g)))
   • (f
      ◃ rassociator (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
          (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂)) g))
  • lassociator f (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₁))
      (endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g))
 • (μ₁ ▹ endo_of_mnd (x,, dm₂) · g)) • (f ◃ μ₂): f · g · (f · g) ==> f · g
(rassociator (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
   (pr2
      (pr1 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc),,
       pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)))
   (pr2
      (pr1 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc),,
       pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)))
 • (pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)
    ◃ pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)))
• pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc) =
(pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)
 ▹ pr12 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc))
• pr222 (make_mnd_data x (f · g) ηc μc)
 exact compose_mnd_assoc.
  Defined.
End ComposeMonad.
